heading: Administrative authorities
label: 2349aa–5 Administrative authorities
text: Except where expressly provided to the contrary, any reference in any law to subchapter I of this chapter shall be deemed to include reference to this part and any reference in any law to subchapter II of this chapter shall be deemed to exclude reference to this part.
notes: CodificationSection 575, formerly 576, of is based on section 201 of title II of H.R. 2992, Ninety-eighth Congress, as reported , and enacted into law by .Pub. L. 87–195Pub. L. 98–151May 17, 1983
Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 574 and is classified to .section 575 of Pub. L. 87–195section 2349aa–4 of this title

References to Subchapter I Deemed To Include Certain Parts of Subchapter II, and References to Subchapter II Deemed To Exclude Such PartsReferences to subchapter I of this chapter are deemed to include parts IV (§ 2346 et seq.) and VI (§ 2348 et seq.) of subchapter II of this chapter, and references to subchapter II are deemed to exclude such parts. See , set out as a note under , and .section 202(b) of Pub. L. 92–226section 2346 of this titlesection 2348c of this title
